name_en: Original FENDI Hot Classic Baguette, made of canvas with high-end craftsmanship. The whole bag features a double FF 3D embroidery texture that is superb, paired with exquisite piping and small color blocking for a stylish look. The wide shoulder strap and flap design are practical, with small details everywhere. Really love it~~ size 27×6×14cm 108F
name_cn:
